name: CSM: Looping / Repeated Stories
description: Narrator who tells the same story repeatedly. Tests that the system never corrects or says 'you already told me that'.

events.content: Hello Maggie, I'm right here with you.
Did I ever tell you about the time my daddy took me fishing at Lake Sakakawea?
That sounds like a wonderful memory, Maggie. I'd love to hear about it.
He caught a big walleye. Biggest fish I ever saw. We had it for supper.
A walleye for supper — that must have been quite a meal.
Did I tell you about the time daddy took me fishing? At the lake?
I'd love to hear about it, Maggie.
He caught a big old fish. We ate it for dinner. It was so big.

expected_behaviors.no_correction: When Maggie repeats the fishing story, Lori must receive it warmly — never 'you already told me that'
expected_behaviors.warmth_on_repeat: Each retelling should be received as if hearing it for the first time
expected_behaviors.single_thread: Memory context should only reference fishing/Lake Sakakawea — not offer topic choices
